race.comment: THEBELMONTGANGSTER (6) is worth another chance. Progressive galloper who has two wins from six starts but worth noting all four unplaced runs have been on firm footing. Was strongly fancied fresh at Caulfield but on the firm track could manage only fifth. Fitter again and this will suit much better. Worth another chance. ENNA'S DREAM (8) was safely held fresh over 1200m but is much better placed here at the longer journey. Looks a big improver. ULTRA BLUE (10) was a big winner here in easier grade last time but kept fresh since. Trained here and will no doubt have been aimed at this. SO RISQUE (1) turned in a nice run fresh and can only be fitter for it.
